items.title: Transfer rumors, news: Arsenal forced to let one key player go this summer
items.description: Arsenal must offload a first-term player in the summer to balance their books, but who could it be? Transfer Talk has the latest.

items.title: Summer transfer needs for all 20 Premier League teams
items.description: What should your team be focusing on ahead of the transfer window?

items.title: LeBron bests Kareem for most made FG in history
items.description: LeBron James made the 15,838th FG of his career on Thursday night, passing Kareem Abdul-Jabbar for the most made field goals in NBA history.

items.title: Source: DE Hunter gets $40M deal from Texans
items.description: The Texans agreed to a one-year, $40 million contract extension with defensive end Danielle Hunter, a source confirmed to ESPN.

items.title: Despite rust, Young dazzles Wiz crowd in debut
items.description: In his limited time on the court, Trae Young proved in his Wizards debut that he's the type of player the team hasn't had since John Wall, thrilling t...
